principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Industrial Precision with Swiss Clarity
Content is King: Data density without clutter
Zoom in: Focus on the container ID and status
Contrast: High contrast for readability in bright/outdoor environments

usage.h1: text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight font-heading uppercase text-slate-900
usage.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500 font-mono

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF4F00] hover:bg-[#CC3F00] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wide rounded-sm shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium rounded-sm shadow-sm

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-sm shadow-sm p-6

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-sm border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#FF4F00] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 font-medium uppercase text-xs tracking-wider border-b border-slate-200

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import link to the <head> of index.html immediately.
UPDATE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the new font families (heading, body, mono) and the custom color palette.
LAYOUT STRUCTURE: Create a Layout component with a collapsible sidebar (Slate Blue bg) and a main content area (Light Grey bg).
LOGIN PAGE: Use the 'login_bg' image as a full-screen background with a glassmorphism card for the login form.
DASHBOARD: Implement the KPI cards using the 'kpi' card style. Use Recharts for any charts, styled with the primary orange color.
TABLES: Build a reusable DataTable component that supports sorting and filtering. Use the 'technical' table styles defined above.
FORMS: Use React Hook Form + Zod for validation. Style inputs with the 'sharp' rounded-sm look.
NOTIFICATIONS: Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (success/error actions).
TESTING: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links) as requested.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic 'blue' for primary actions. Use the defined #FF4F00.
Avoid rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Stick to rounded-sm (2px-4px) for that industrial feel.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings (h1-h3) and 'Public Sans' for body text.
Ensure high contrast for text. No light grey text on white backgrounds.
Add micro-interactions: hover states on rows, active states on buttons.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds; use solid colors or subtle noise textures if needed.
